speaker: Huber
content: Susan, have you been able to find old clothes for Eddie? She has nothing to wear.
mark: have you been able to do sth for sb? 该句式强调从过去某个时间点到现在这段时间内，是否具备能力并完成了为他人做某事这一动作。

speaker: Susan
content: I thought that was the look she was going for.
mark: be going for 追求，争取得到; 打算做某事

speaker: Huber
content: Oh, Susan, Eddie may be trash, but she is still a human being.

speaker: Susan
content: Zach, is your dad home? I need to talk to him. Hi, Paul, I hope I'm not interrupting.

speaker: Paul
content: Actually, I was getting ready to go somewhere.
mark: be getting ready to do sth 正在准备做某事
be ready to do sth 准备好做某事

speaker: Susan
content: I just wanted to come by and say hello. You know, see how you guys are doing.
mark: see how you guys are doing 常见的英语表达，意思是“看看你们怎么样了”

speaker: Paul
content: We're trying to move on, it's been pretty tough.
mark: tough adj. 坚韧的，坚固的；困难的，棘手的；艰难的，困苦的，难熬的；

speaker: Susan
content: I can only imagine, not knowing why Mary Alice...
mark: Not knowing 不知道, 现在分词短语作状语

speaker: Susan
content: Why she did it. Oh, let me help you.

speaker: Paul
content: I got it. I've got it.

speaker: Susan
content: I'm sorry if I upset you.

speaker: Paul
mark: frank adj. 坦率的，直言不讳的；明白无误的，症状明显的
Can I be frank? 我能坦率地说吗？

speaker: Paul
content: I don't care what her reasons were. Maybe she was depressed, maybe she was bored, it doesn't matter.
mark: depress v. 使抑郁，使沮丧；降低，抑制；使萧条，使不景气；按下，压下

speaker: Paul
content: She abandoned her husband and her son, and I'll never forgive her.

speaker: Alice
content: As I watched Susan, I couldn't help feeling sorry for her. She wanted so much to know why I did it, why I killed myself.

speaker: Alice
content: It's not enough to want the truth, you must know where to look for it. And the truth is elusive, because it knows where to hide.
mark: elusive adj. 难以理解的，难以记住的；难以发现的，难以捕获的
